alt_text: A clean internal architecture page for the skill \"stark-review\" showing a top summary strip with control-plane stats, a vertical workflow diagram from invocation through setup, auth gating, worktree isolation, parallel 18-agent review rounds, classification and fixing, summary generation, posting, and cleanup, followed by tables for runtime contracts and decision gates, cards for observability, failure recovery, and extension points, all color-coded by phase, decision, config, output, failure, and external dependency."}}
